yara_rules.rule_text:
rule CDB_Iranlinked_MuddyWater_deploys_Dindoor_ma {
    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Iran-linked MuddyWater deploys Dindoor malware against U.S. organizations"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-08"
    strings:
                $actor = "CDB-APT-22" ascii wide nocase
        $kw0 = "MuddyWater" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

rule CDB_CVE202629790__dbtcommon_commonprefix_doe {

        description = "Detection for CVE-2026-29790 - dbt-common: commonprefix() doesn't protect against path travers"
        severity = "high"
        date = "2026-03-08"
    strings:
                $cve0 = "CVE-2026-29790" ascii wide nocase
        $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}
